meta.title: DM Trainer AI — Train Your Dungeon Master Skills
meta.description: Practice DMing with AI-powered players that behave like real tabletop gamers.

landing.heroSubtitle: Practice being a Dungeon Master against AI players that behave like real people. Chaotic roleplayers, shy beginners, tactical veterans — get honest feedback and level up fast.

steps.title: Create a Session
steps.desc: Set your campaign tone, difficulty, and how many AI players you want (2–6).

steps.title: Generate Your Party
steps.desc: AI generates a unique group of players with personalities, motivations and quirks.

steps.title: Run Your Session
steps.desc: Narrate scenes, describe events. Your AI party responds like real players.

steps.title: Receive Feedback
steps.desc: End the session and get your DM evaluation with scores and coaching tips.

players.label: Your Party
players.title: Meet the Players
players.subtitle: Every session generates a unique party. Real player archetypes, real behaviors, real chaos.

archetypes.desc: "I try to steal from the party..."
"Sorry, is this okay? What do I roll?"

items.title: Realistic AI Players
items.description: Generate a party with distinct personalities — the chaotic roleplayer, the tactical veteran, the shy beginner. They argue, hesitate, and react like real people.

items.title: Session Memory
items.description: AI players remember your story. NPCs they met, promises made, dangers faced. Every session builds on the last.

items.title: DM Evaluation
items.description: Get honest, specific feedback on pacing, atmosphere, player freedom, clarity and more. No sugar-coating — just coaching that makes you better.

items.title: Multiple Difficulty Levels
items.description: Easy to hard. A supportive beginner party or a demanding group of veterans. Train against the challenge you need.

evaluation.label: Evaluation
evaluation.title: Honest DM Feedback
evaluation.subtitle: After every session, your AI party evaluates your performance across 7 categories.
sampleTips: Your scene descriptions were vivid — keep using sensory details to set atmosphere.
Thorin seemed frustrated by the long negotiation scene. Consider cutting to action sooner.
Players looked confused about the map layout. Use more directional landmarks.

cta.title: Ready to Level Up?
cta.subtitle: Stop guessing and start training. Your first AI party awaits.

landing.footer: Built for Dungeon Masters who want to get better. Powered by AI.

dashboard.label: New Session
dashboard.title: Setup Your Session
dashboard.subtitle: Configure your training session. Your AI party will be generated based on these settings.

titleField.label: Session Title
titleField.placeholder: e.g. The Sunken City, First Session...

descriptionField.label: Campaign Description
descriptionField.placeholder: Describe your campaign scenario in a few sentences...
exampleCampaigns: A band of adventurers investigate strange disappearances in a coastal town. Locals speak of sea creatures and an ancient curse.
The party must escort a diplomat through enemy territory. Ambushes, spies, and moral dilemmas await.
A mystery unfolds in a gothic mansion. Someone among the guests is a murderer — and the party is trapped inside.
The kingdom is at war. The adventurers must choose sides, navigate politics, and survive the battlefield.

playerCountField.label: Number of AI Players
playerCountField.hint: {{count}} unique AI players will be generated

chat.inputPlaceholder: Narrate a scene, describe what happens, ask the party something...
chat.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line

system.sessionStarted: Session "{{title}}" started. Generating your {{count}} AI players...
system.partyReady: Party assembled! {{names}} are ready. Begin your session below.

session.endConfirm: End this session and receive your DM evaluation?

loading.title: Evaluating Your Session
loading.subtitle: Your AI party is reviewing your DM performance...

feedback.title: DM Evaluation Report
feedback.error: Failed to generate feedback. Please try again.
feedback.tooShort: Session too short to evaluate. Have a longer session first!
